title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JobPilot is a full-stack AI job application platform that demonstrates how to build with AI agents using context files and open-source agent skills. The platform includes profile management with AI-powered resume extraction, job discovery via Adzuna API, and filtering, with supporting infrastructure like Browserbase for web scraping and PostHog analytics.
